info.name: SAP-GCP Weather APIs
info.description: Middleware layer built using SAP Integration Suite to abstract and combine GCP weather, geocode and Gemini API into secure and scalable REST endpoints.

item.name: Current Forecast

request.description:
## Get Forecast by Address

Retrieves the **current weather forecast** for a specified location using a human-readable address string.

### Endpoint

`GET {{baseUrl}}/current`

### Query Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `loc` | string | Yes | The location address to fetch weather for (e.g. `"Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India"`). Mapped to the `{{location}}` variable. |
| `units` | string | No | Imperial or Metric (Metric by default) |

### Response

Returns a JSON object with the following fields:

| Field | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `address` | string | Resolved address string for the queried location. |
| `coordinates.lat` | string | Latitude of the resolved location. |
| `coordinates.lng` | string | Longitude of the resolved location. |
| `unitsSystem` | string | Unit system used (e.g. `METRIC`). |
| `timestamp` | string | ISO 8601 timestamp of the weather observation. |
| `weather.temperature` | string | Current temperature with unit (e.g. `"30 CELSIUS"`). |
| `weather.humidity` | integer | Relative humidity percentage. |
| `weather.description.iconUri` | string | URI for the weather condition icon. |
| `weather.description.description` | string | Human-readable weather condition (e.g. `"Partly cloudy"`). |
| `weather.windSpeed` | integer | Wind speed value. |
| `weather.windDirection` | string | Wind direction (e.g. `"275 WEST"`). |
| `weather.precipitation.type` | string | Type of precipitation (e.g. `"RAIN"`). |
| `weather.precipitation.percent` | integer | Probability of precipitation (%). |
| `weather.visibility` | string | Visibility distance (e.g. `"16 KILOMETERS"`). |
| `weather.uvIndex` | integer | UV index value. |
| `weather.cloudCover` | integer | Cloud cover percentage. |
| `weather.isDaytime` | boolean | Whether it is currently daytime at the location. |

### Example Response

``` json
{
  "address": "Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India",
  "coordinates": {
    "lat": "22.7195687",
    "lng": "75.8577258"
  },
  "unitsSystem": "METRIC",
  "timestamp": "2026-07-16T19:18:02.036391096+05:30[Asia/Calcutta]",
  "weather": {
    "temperature": "30 CELSIUS",
    "humidity": 57,
    "description": {
      "iconUri": "https://maps.gstatic.com/weather/v1/partly_clear",
      "description": "Partly cloudy"
    },
    "windSpeed": 13,
    "windDirection": "275 WEST",
    "precipitation": {
      "type": "RAIN",
      "percent": 7
    },
    "visibility": "16 KILOMETERS",
    "uvIndex": 0,
    "cloudCover": 61,
    "isDaytime": false
  }
}

 ```

### Variables Used

| Variable | Description |
| --- | --- |
| `{{baseUrl}}` | Base URL of the SAP-GCP Weather API service. |
| `{{location}}` | The address/location string to query weather for. |

## Get Forecast by Coordinates

Retrieves the current weather forecast for a specific geographic location identified by its latitude and longitude coordinates.

### Base URL

`{{baseUrl}}`

### Authentication

This request requires an API key passed via the `x-api-key` header (use the `{{apiKey}}` variable).

---

### Query Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `lat` | number | Yes | Latitude of the target location (e.g. `28.6139` for New Delhi). Use the `{{lat}}` variable. |
| `lng` | number | Yes | Longitude of the target location (e.g. `77.2090` for New Delhi). Use the `{{lng}}` variable. |
| `unitsSystem` | string | No | Unit system for the response values. Accepted values: `METRIC`, `Imperial`. Defaults to `METRIC`. Use the `{{units}}` variable. |

---

### Response

Returns a JSON object with the current weather conditions at the specified coordinates.

**Sample Response (200 OK)**

``` json
{
  "address": "J675+HJ6, Kartavya Path, Central Secretariat, New Delhi, Delhi 110011, India",
  "coordinates": {
    "lat": "28.6139",
    "lng": "77.2090"
  },
  "unitsSystem": "METRIC",
  "timestamp": "2026-07-16T19:42:15.752398322+05:30[Asia/Calcutta]",
  "weather": {
    "temperature": "37.7 CELSIUS",
    "humidity": 40,
    "description": {
      "iconUri": "https://maps.gstatic.com/weather/v1/mostly_cloudy_night",
      "description": "Mostly cloudy"
    },
    "windSpeed": 5,
    "windDirection": "293 WEST_NORTHWEST",
    "precipitation": {
      "type": "RAIN",
      "percent": 10
    },
    "visibility": "16 KILOMETERS",
    "uvIndex": 0,
    "cloudCover": 88,
    "isDaytime": false
  }
}

 ```

**Response Fields**

| Field | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `address` | string | Resolved human-readable address for the coordinates |
| `coordinates.lat` | string | Latitude used in the request |
| `coordinates.lng` | string | Longitude used in the request |
| `unitsSystem` | string | Unit system applied (`METRIC` or `Imperial`) |
| `timestamp` | string | ISO 8601 timestamp of the weather observation |
| `weather.temperature` | string | Current temperature with unit |
| `weather.humidity` | number | Relative humidity percentage |
| `weather.description.description` | string | Human-readable weather condition |
| `weather.description.iconUri` | string | URL of the weather condition icon |
| `weather.windSpeed` | number | Wind speed in the selected unit system |
| `weather.windDirection` | string | Wind direction in degrees and compass label |
| `weather.precipitation.type` | string | Type of precipitation (e.g. `RAIN`) |
| `weather.precipitation.percent` | number | Probability of precipitation (%) |
| `weather.visibility` | string | Visibility distance with unit |
| `weather.uvIndex` | number | UV index at the time of observation |
| `weather.cloudCover` | number | Cloud cover percentage |
| `weather.isDaytime` | boolean | `true` if the observation is during daytime |

item.description: GCP Geocoding and Weather API abstraction — current weather forecast for input address or coordinates.

item.name: Current Forecast Summary

request.description:
Returns a concise, human-readable weather summary for a given address or location string.

## Endpoint

`GET {{baseUrl}}/summary`

## Query Parameters

| Parameter | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `loc` | Yes | The location to retrieve the forecast summary for. Accepts a human-readable address string (e.g. `Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India`). Mapped to the `{{location}}` variable. |

## Response

Returns a JSON object with the following fields:

| Field | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `address` | string | Resolved address for the provided location. |
| `coordinates` | object | Latitude (`lat`) and longitude (`lng`) of the resolved location. |
| `timestamp` | string | ISO 8601 timestamp of when the summary was generated, including timezone offset. |
| `summary` | string | A natural-language description of current weather conditions, including temperature, sky conditions, humidity, wind speed and direction, visibility, and chance of rain. |

## Example Response

``` json
{
  "address": "Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India",
  "coordinates": {
    "lat": "22.7195687",
    "lng": "75.8577258"
  },
  "timestamp": "2026-07-16T19:45:36.476494280+05:30[Asia/Calcutta]",
  "summary": "It is currently night in Indore with a temperature of 29.7°C and mostly cloudy skies. Conditions are humid at 59% with a light westerly wind of 13 km/h, excellent visibility of 16 km, and a negligible 9% chance of rain."
}

 ```

## Variables Used

- `{{baseUrl}}` — Base URL of the SAP-GCP Weather API service.
    
- `{{location}}` — The target location string passed as the `loc` query parameter.

Returns a concise, human-readable weather summary for a given address or location string.

## Endpoint

`GET {{baseUrl}}/summary`

## Query Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `lat` | number | Yes | Latitude of the target location (e.g. `28.6139` for New Delhi). Use the `{{lat}}` variable. |
| `lng` | number | Yes | Longitude of the target location (e.g. `77.2090` for New Delhi). Use the `{{lng}}` variable. |
| `unitsSystem` | string | No | Unit system for the response values. Accepted values: `METRIC`, `Imperial`. Defaults to `METRIC`. Use the `{{units}}` variable. |


## Response

Returns a JSON object with the following fields:

| Field | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `address` | string | Resolved address for the provided location. |
| `coordinates` | object | Latitude (`lat`) and longitude (`lng`) of the resolved location. |
| `timestamp` | string | ISO 8601 timestamp of when the summary was generated, including timezone offset. |
| `summary` | string | A natural-language description of current weather conditions, including temperature, sky conditions, humidity, wind speed and direction, visibility, and chance of rain. |

## Example Response

``` json
{
  "address": "Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India",
  "coordinates": {
    "lat": "22.7195687",
    "lng": "75.8577258"
  },
  "timestamp": "2026-07-16T19:45:36.476494280+05:30[Asia/Calcutta]",
  "summary": "It is currently night in Indore with a temperature of 29.7°C and mostly cloudy skies. Conditions are humid at 59% with a light westerly wind of 13 km/h, excellent visibility of 16 km, and a negligible 9% chance of rain."
}

 ```

## Variables Used

- `{{baseUrl}}` — Base URL of the SAP-GCP Weather API service.
    
- `{{location}}` — The target location string passed as the `loc` query parameter.

item.description: GCP Gemini API — generate current weather forecast summary for input address or coordinates.

item.name: Forecast

request.description:
Retrieves a multi-day daily weather forecast for a specified address or location string.

## Endpoint

`GET {{baseUrl}}/forecast`

## Query Parameters

| Parameter | Variable | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `loc` | `{{location}}` | Yes | The address or location string to retrieve the forecast for (e.g., `"Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India"`). |
| `units` | `{{dailyForecast}}` | Yes | The unit system for temperature and weather data (e.g., `METRIC` or `IMPERIAL`). |
| `unitsToForecast` | `{{forecastUnits}}` | Yes | The number of days to forecast ahead. |

## Response

Returns a JSON object containing:

- **`location`** – Resolved location name.
    
- **`coordinates`** – Latitude and longitude of the resolved location.
    
- **`unitSystem`** – The unit system used in the response (e.g., `METRIC`).
    
- **`forecast`** – An array of daily forecast objects, each containing:
    - `date` – The forecast date.
        
    - `tempMax` / `tempMin` – Maximum and minimum temperatures for the day.
        
    - `sunrise` / `sunset` – Sunrise and sunset times with timezone.
        
    - `moonPhase` – Current moon phase (e.g., `WAXING_CRESCENT`).
        
    - `day` / `night` – Separate day and night condition blocks, each including:
        - `condition` – Weather condition description (e.g., `Light rain`, `Cloudy`).
            
        - `iconUrl` – URL to the weather condition icon.
            
        - `humidity` – Humidity percentage.
            
        - `uvIndex` – UV index value.
            
        - `precipitationProbability` – Probability of precipitation (%).
            
        - `precipitationType` – Type of precipitation (e.g., `RAIN`).
            
        - `windSpeed` – Wind speed with unit.
            
        - `windDirection` – Wind direction in degrees and cardinal direction.
            
        - `cloudCover` – Cloud cover percentage.
            

## Example Response (truncated)

``` json
{
  "location": "Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India",
  "coordinates": {
    "latitude": "22.7195687",
    "longitude": "75.8577258"
  },
  "unitSystem": "METRIC",
  "forecast": [
    {
      "date": "2026-7-16",
      "tempMax": "32.9 CELSIUS",
      "tempMin": "24.9 CELSIUS",
      "sunrise": "2026-07-16T05:50:56+05:30",
      "sunset": "2026-07-16T19:14:12+05:30",
      "moonPhase": "WAXING_CRESCENT",
      "day": {
        "condition": "Light rain",
        "humidity": 57,
        "uvIndex": 9,
        "precipitationProbability": 35,
        "precipitationType": "RAIN",
        "windSpeed": "18 KILOMETERS_PER_HOUR",
        "windDirection": "280 WEST",
        "cloudCover": 99
      },
      "night": {
        "condition": "Cloudy",
        "humidity": 71,
        "precipitationProbability": 20,
        "windSpeed": "16 KILOMETERS_PER_HOUR",
        "windDirection": "268 WEST",
        "cloudCover": 99
      }
    }
  ]
}

 ```

item.description: GCP Weather API abstraction — fetch weather forecast for up to 10 days or 240 hours.

item.name: Weather Alert

request.description:
Retrieves active severe weather alerts for a specified address or location string, using the Google Weather and Geocoding APIs via the SAP Integration Suite middleware.

## Endpoint

`GET {{baseUrl}}/alert`

## Query Parameters

| Parameter | Variable | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `loc` | `{{location}}` | Yes | The address or location string to check for active weather alerts (e.g., `"Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India"`). |

## Response

Returns a JSON object containing:

- **`address`** – Resolved address string for the queried location.
- **`coordinates`** – Latitude (`lat`) and longitude (`lng`) of the resolved location.
- **`alerts`** – An array of active weather alert objects. Each alert contains:
  - `headline` – Short title or headline of the alert.
  - `severity` – Severity level of the alert (e.g., `Extreme`, `Severe`, `Moderate`).
  - `urgency` – Urgency classification (e.g., `Immediate`, `Expected`).
  - `areas` – Geographic areas affected by the alert.
  - `event` – Type of weather event (e.g., `Tornado Warning`, `Flash Flood Watch`).
  - `effective` – ISO 8601 timestamp when the alert becomes effective.
  - `expires` – ISO 8601 timestamp when the alert expires.
  - `description` – Detailed description of the alert.
  - `instruction` – Recommended safety instructions or actions.

If no active alerts exist for the location, the `alerts` array will be empty.

## Notes

- This endpoint resolves the human-readable address to coordinates internally using the Geocoding API before querying for alerts.
- Use the `{{location}}` environment variable to set the target location.

item.description: Google Weather and Geocoding API - get severe alert for input location if any

item.name: Dashboard

request.description:
## Get Cumulative Info by Address

Retrieves a comprehensive, all-in-one weather dashboard for a given geographic location (specified by latitude and longitude). This endpoint aggregates multiple weather data points into a single response, eliminating the need for multiple API calls.

### Response includes

| Section | Description |
| --- | --- |
| `currentWeather` | Real-time conditions: temperature (current, min, max), humidity, wind speed & direction, precipitation probability, UV index, cloud cover, visibility, and a human-readable summary |
| `alert` | Any active weather alerts for the location (e.g. High Temperature Alert) with a message and safety recommendation |
| `hourlyForecast` | Hour-by-hour forecast for the next 12 hours, including condition, temperature, humidity, UV index, wind, precipitation probability, and cloud cover |
| `dailyForecast` | Day-by-day forecast for the next 10 days, with max/min temperatures and separate day and night condition breakdowns |

### Query Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `lat` | number | Yes | Latitude of the target location (e.g. `28.6139`) |
| `lng` | number | Yes | Longitude of the target location (e.g. `77.2090`) |

### Variables used

- `{{baseUrl}}` — Base URL of the SAP-GCP Weather API service
    
- `{{lat}}` — Latitude of the target location
    
- `{{lng}}` — Longitude of the target location
    

### Example response structure

``` json
{
  "weatherResponse": {
    "address": "...",
    "coordinates": { "latitude": "28.6139", "longitude": "77.2090" },
    "timeZone": "Asia/Calcutta",
    "timestamp": "2026-07-16T14:34:53Z",
    "currentWeather": { ... },
    "alert": {
      "alert": "High Temperature Alert",
      "message": "Temperature is expected to exceed 30°C.",
      "recommendation": "Stay hydrated and avoid prolonged exposure to the sun."
    },
    "hourlyForecast": { "summary": "...", "forecast": [ ... ] },
    "dailyForecast": { "forecast": [ ... ] }
  }
}

 ```

## Get Cumulative Info by Address

Retrieves a comprehensive, all-in-one weather dashboard for a given geographic location (specified by latitude and longitude). This endpoint aggregates multiple weather data points into a single response, eliminating the need for multiple API calls.

### Response includes

| Section | Description |
| --- | --- |
| `currentWeather` | Real-time conditions: temperature (current, min, max), humidity, wind speed & direction, precipitation probability, UV index, cloud cover, visibility, and a human-readable summary |
| `alert` | Any active weather alerts for the location (e.g. High Temperature Alert) with a message and safety recommendation |
| `hourlyForecast` | Hour-by-hour forecast for the next 12 hours, including condition, temperature, humidity, UV index, wind, precipitation probability, and cloud cover |
| `dailyForecast` | Day-by-day forecast for the next 10 days, with max/min temperatures and separate day and night condition breakdowns |

### Query Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `loc` | string | Yes | Request address |

### Variables used

- `{{baseUrl}}` — Base URL of the SAP-GCP Weather API service
    
- `{{loc}}` — Target location address

### Example response structure

``` json
{
  "weatherResponse": {
    "address": "...",
    "coordinates": { "latitude": "28.6139", "longitude": "77.2090" },
    "timeZone": "Asia/Calcutta",
    "timestamp": "2026-07-16T14:34:53Z",
    "currentWeather": { ... },
    "alert": {
      "alert": "High Temperature Alert",
      "message": "Temperature is expected to exceed 30°C.",
      "recommendation": "Stay hydrated and avoid prolonged exposure to the sun."
    },
    "hourlyForecast": { "summary": "...", "forecast": [ ... ] },
    "dailyForecast": { "forecast": [ ... ] }
  }
}

 ```
